whole_numbers_y4.title: Whole Numbers up to 100 000
whole_numbers_y4.description: Read, write, compare, classify, and continue number patterns
whole_numbers_y4.descriptionBm: Baca, tulis, banding, kelaskan dan sambung pola nombor

decimals_y4.title: Decimals
decimals_y4.description: Read, compare, and calculate with decimal values.
decimals_y4.descriptionBm: Baca, banding dan kira nilai perpuluhan.

percentages_y4.title: Percentages
percentages_y4.description: Connect percentages with parts of one hundred.
percentages_y4.descriptionBm: Hubungkan peratus dengan bahagian daripada seratus.

money_y4.title: Money
money_y4.description: Solve daily spending problems using ringgit and sen.
money_y4.descriptionBm: Selesaikan masalah perbelanjaan harian menggunakan ringgit dan sen.

whole_numbers_y4_read_write_numbers.title: Read and Write Numbers
whole_numbers_y4_read_write_numbers.description: Read and write numbers in numerals and words.
whole_numbers_y4_read_write_numbers.descriptionBm: Baca dan tulis nombor dalam angka dan perkataan.

whole_numbers_y4_place_digit_value.title: Place Value and Digit Value
whole_numbers_y4_place_digit_value.description: Identify place value, digit value, and expanded form.
whole_numbers_y4_place_digit_value.descriptionBm: Kenal nilai tempat, nilai digit dan cerakinan.

whole_numbers_y4_compare_order_numbers.title: Compare and Order Numbers
whole_numbers_y4_compare_order_numbers.description: Compare numbers and arrange them in order.
whole_numbers_y4_compare_order_numbers.descriptionBm: Banding nombor dan susun mengikut tertib.

whole_numbers_y4_odd_even_numbers.title: Odd and Even Numbers
whole_numbers_y4_odd_even_numbers.description: Classify numbers as odd or even.
whole_numbers_y4_odd_even_numbers.descriptionBm: Kelaskan nombor sebagai ganjil atau genap.

whole_numbers_y4_number_patterns.title: Number Patterns
whole_numbers_y4_number_patterns.description: Recognise and continue ascending or descending patterns.
whole_numbers_y4_number_patterns.descriptionBm: Kenal dan sambung pola menaik atau menurun.

q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_01.questionText: Which numeral shows twenty thousand four?
q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_01.questionTextBm: Angka manakah menunjukkan dua puluh ribu empat?
q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_01.explanation: Remember: twenty thousand four has 2 in the ten-thousands place and 4 ones.
q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_01.explanationBm: Ingat: dua puluh ribu empat mempunyai 2 di tempat puluh ribu dan 4 sa.

q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_02.explanation: Remember: 70 015 is read as seventy thousand fifteen.
q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_02.explanationBm: Ingat: 70 015 dibaca sebagai tujuh puluh ribu lima belas.

q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_03.questionText: Which numeral matches sixty-one thousand seven hundred?
q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_03.questionTextBm: Angka manakah sepadan dengan enam puluh satu ribu tujuh ratus?
q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_03.explanation: Understand: seven hundred means 700, so the number is 61 700.
q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_03.explanationBm: Fahami: tujuh ratus bermaksud 700, jadi nombornya ialah 61 700.

optionsBm: empat belas ribu sembilan ratus enam
empat belas ribu sembilan puluh enam
seribu empat ratus sembilan puluh enam
empat puluh ribu sembilan ratus enam

q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_05.questionText: Write thirty-eight thousand two hundred nine in numerals.
q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_05.questionTextBm: Tulis tiga puluh lapan ribu dua ratus sembilan dalam angka.
q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_05.explanation: Apply: combine 38 thousand and 209 to form 38 209.

q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_06.questionText: A card says 50 813. Which sentence reads it correctly?
q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_06.questionTextBm: Kad menunjukkan 50 813. Ayat manakah membacanya dengan betul?
optionsBm: lima puluh ribu lapan ratus tiga belas
lima ribu lapan ratus tiga belas
lima puluh ribu lapan puluh tiga
lima belas ribu lapan ratus tiga belas
q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_06.explanation: Apply: read each place from left to right.
q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_06.explanationBm: Aplikasi: baca setiap nilai tempat dari kiri ke kanan.

optionsBm: 47 293 - empat puluh tujuh ribu dua ratus sembilan puluh tiga
61 700 - enam puluh satu ribu tujuh puluh
q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_07.explanation: Analyze: 61 700 is sixty-one thousand seven hundred, not seventy.
q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_07.explanationBm: Analisis: 61 700 ialah enam puluh satu ribu tujuh ratus, bukan tujuh puluh.

q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_08.questionText: Which number has the same wording pattern as 20 004?
q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_08.questionTextBm: Nombor manakah mempunyai pola bacaan yang sama seperti 20 004?
q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_08.explanation: Analyze: both 20 004 and 30 006 have thousands and ones with no hundreds or tens.
q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_08.explanationBm: Analisis: kedua-duanya mempunyai ribu dan sa tanpa ratus atau puluh.

q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_09.questionText: A pupil writes 40 300 as forty thousand three. What is the best correction?
q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_09.questionTextBm: Murid menulis 40 300 sebagai empat puluh ribu tiga. Apakah pembetulan terbaik?
options: It should be forty thousand three hundred.
It should be four thousand three hundred.
It should be forty thousand thirty.
optionsBm: Sepatutnya empat puluh ribu tiga ratus.
Sepatutnya empat puluh ribu tiga puluh.
q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_09.explanation: Evaluate: the digit 3 is in the hundreds place, so it means three hundred.
q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_09.explanationBm: Menilai: digit 3 berada di tempat ratus, jadi nilainya tiga ratus.

q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_10.questionText: Which number is best for the clue: 6 ten-thousands, 3 thousands, 8 hundreds, 4 tens, 1 one?
q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_10.questionTextBm: Nombor manakah terbaik untuk petunjuk: 6 puluh ribu, 3 ribu, 8 ratus, 4 puluh, 1 sa?
q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_10.explanation: Create: build the number from each place value in order.
q_y4_whole_read_write_numbers_10.explanationBm: Mencipta: bina nombor mengikut setiap nilai tempat secara tertib.

q_y4_whole_place_digit_value_01.questionText: In 62 307, what is the place value of digit 6?
q_y4_whole_place_digit_value_01.questionTextBm: Dalam 62 307, apakah nilai tempat bagi digit 6?
q_y4_whole_place_digit_value_01.explanation: Remember: digit 6 is in the ten-thousands place.
q_y4_whole_place_digit_value_01.explanationBm: Ingat: digit 6 berada di tempat puluh ribu.

q_y4_whole_place_digit_value_02.questionText: In 62 307, what is the digit value of 6?

q_y4_whole_place_digit_value_03.questionText: Which expanded form is correct for 62 307?
q_y4_whole_place_digit_value_03.explanation: Understand: split each non-zero digit by its place value.
q_y4_whole_place_digit_value_03.explanationBm: Fahami: cerakinkan setiap digit bukan sifar mengikut nilai tempat.

q_y4_whole_place_digit_value_04.questionText: What does the digit 3 mean in 45 309?
q_y4_whole_place_digit_value_04.explanation: Understand: the 3 is in the hundreds place, so it means 300.
q_y4_whole_place_digit_value_04.explanationBm: Fahami: 3 berada di tempat ratus, jadi nilainya 300.

q_y4_whole_place_digit_value_06.explanation: Apply: the digit 9 is in the hundreds place, so its value is 900.
q_y4_whole_place_digit_value_06.explanationBm: Aplikasi: digit 9 di tempat ratus, jadi nilainya 900.

q_y4_whole_place_digit_value_07.explanation: Analyze: 8 must be in the ten-thousands place.
q_y4_whole_place_digit_value_07.explanationBm: Analisis: 8 mesti berada di tempat puluh ribu.

q_y4_whole_place_digit_value_08.explanation: Analyze: in 65 174, digit 5 is in the thousands place.
q_y4_whole_place_digit_value_08.explanationBm: Analisis: dalam 65 174, digit 5 berada di tempat ribu.

q_y4_whole_place_digit_value_09.questionText: A pupil writes 11 568 = 10 000 + 1 000 + 500 + 60 + 8. Is it correct?
options: Correct, all digit values are shown.
q_y4_whole_place_digit_value_09.explanation: Evaluate: each part matches the digit value in 11 568.
q_y4_whole_place_digit_value_09.explanationBm: Menilai: setiap bahagian sepadan dengan nilai digit dalam 11 568.

q_y4_whole_compare_order_numbers_01.explanation: Remember: compare from the ten-thousands place first.
q_y4_whole_compare_order_numbers_01.explanationBm: Ingat: banding dari tempat puluh ribu dahulu.

q_y4_whole_compare_order_numbers_03.explanation: Understand: 6 387 has fewer thousands than the other numbers.
q_y4_whole_compare_order_numbers_03.explanationBm: Fahami: 6 387 mempunyai nilai ribu yang lebih kecil.

q_y4_whole_compare_order_numbers_04.explanation: Understand: ascending order means smallest to largest.
q_y4_whole_compare_order_numbers_04.explanationBm: Fahami: tertib menaik bermaksud paling kecil ke paling besar.

q_y4_whole_compare_order_numbers_05.explanation: Apply: 54 001 is greater than 52 173 and less than 59 000.
q_y4_whole_compare_order_numbers_05.explanationBm: Aplikasi: 54 001 lebih daripada 52 173 dan kurang daripada 59 000.

q_y4_whole_compare_order_numbers_06.explanation: Apply: descending order means largest to smallest.
q_y4_whole_compare_order_numbers_06.explanationBm: Aplikasi: tertib menurun bermaksud paling besar ke paling kecil.

q_y4_whole_compare_order_numbers_07.questionText: In 13 719 and 14 419, which digit comparison decides the smaller number?
q_y4_whole_compare_order_numbers_07.questionTextBm: Dalam 13 719 dan 14 419, perbandingan digit manakah menentukan nombor yang lebih kecil?
options: Compare the thousands digits after ten-thousands are equal.
optionsBm: Banding digit ribu selepas puluh ribu sama.
q_y4_whole_compare_order_numbers_07.explanation: Analyze: both have 1 ten-thousand, then 3 thousands is less than 4 thousands.
q_y4_whole_compare_order_numbers_07.explanationBm: Analisis: kedua-duanya ada 1 puluh ribu, kemudian 3 ribu kurang daripada 4 ribu.

q_y4_whole_compare_order_numbers_08.questionText: Which list has one number out of order?
q_y4_whole_compare_order_numbers_08.questionTextBm: Senarai manakah mempunyai satu nombor tidak mengikut tertib?
q_y4_whole_compare_order_numbers_08.explanation: Analyze: 18 013 should come before 18 031 in ascending order.
q_y4_whole_compare_order_numbers_08.explanationBm: Analisis: 18 013 sepatutnya berada sebelum 18 031 dalam tertib menaik.

q_y4_whole_compare_order_numbers_09.questionText: A student says 89 127 is smaller than 89 413 because 7 is smaller than 3 is false. Which reason is best?
q_y4_whole_compare_order_numbers_09.questionTextBm: Murid berkata 89 127 lebih kecil daripada 89 413 kerana 7 lebih kecil daripada 3 adalah salah. Sebab manakah terbaik?
options: Compare hundreds before ones; 1 hundred is less than 4 hundreds.
Compare ones first in every number.
optionsBm: Banding ratus sebelum sa; 1 ratus kurang daripada 4 ratus.
Banding sa dahulu untuk semua nombor.
q_y4_whole_compare_order_numbers_09.explanation: Evaluate: the result is right, but the best reason uses the first different place.
q_y4_whole_compare_order_numbers_09.explanationBm: Menilai: jawapan betul, tetapi sebab terbaik menggunakan nilai tempat berbeza yang pertama.

q_y4_whole_compare_order_numbers_10.questionText: Which value can replace K so that 40 298, 52 173, K, 59 000 is ascending?
q_y4_whole_compare_order_numbers_10.questionTextBm: Nilai manakah boleh menggantikan K supaya 40 298, 52 173, K, 59 000 ialah tertib menaik?
q_y4_whole_compare_order_numbers_10.explanation: Create: choose a number greater than 52 173 and smaller than 59 000.
q_y4_whole_compare_order_numbers_10.explanationBm: Mencipta: pilih nombor yang lebih besar daripada 52 173 dan lebih kecil daripada 59 000.

q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_01.questionText: Which ending digit shows an even number?
q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_01.questionTextBm: Digit akhir manakah menunjukkan nombor genap?
q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_01.explanation: Remember: even numbers end with 0, 2, 4, 6, or 8.
q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_01.explanationBm: Ingat: nombor genap berakhir dengan 0, 2, 4, 6 atau 8.

q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_02.explanation: Remember: 64 271 ends with 1, so it is odd.
q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_02.explanationBm: Ingat: 64 271 berakhir dengan 1, jadi nombor itu ganjil.

options: It can be divided by 2 without a remainder.
It ends with 8, so it is odd.
q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_03.explanation: Understand: even numbers can be grouped in pairs exactly.
q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_03.explanationBm: Fahami: nombor genap boleh dikumpulkan secara berpasangan tepat.

q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_04.questionText: Which pair contains one odd and one even number?
q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_04.questionTextBm: Pasangan manakah mengandungi satu nombor ganjil dan satu nombor genap?
q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_04.explanation: Understand: 6 020 is even and 6 303 is odd.
q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_04.explanationBm: Fahami: 6 020 ialah genap dan 6 303 ialah ganjil.

q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_05.questionText: List all odd numbers from 520 to 531.
q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_05.questionTextBm: Senaraikan semua nombor ganjil dari 520 hingga 531.
q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_05.explanation: Apply: choose numbers ending with 1, 3, 5, 7, or 9.
q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_05.explanationBm: Aplikasi: pilih nombor yang berakhir dengan 1, 3, 5, 7 atau 9.

options: All numbers ending with 5 are even.
All numbers ending with 2 are even.
All numbers ending with 8 are odd.
All numbers ending with 0 are odd.
optionsBm: Semua nombor berakhir dengan 5 ialah genap.
Semua nombor berakhir dengan 2 ialah genap.
Semua nombor berakhir dengan 8 ialah ganjil.
Semua nombor berakhir dengan 0 ialah ganjil.
q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_07.explanation: Analyze: the last digit decides odd or even.
q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_07.explanationBm: Analisis: digit akhir menentukan ganjil atau genap.

q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_08.questionText: A number ends with 9. What can you conclude?
q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_08.questionTextBm: Satu nombor berakhir dengan 9. Apakah kesimpulannya?
optionsBm: Nombor itu mesti mempunyai lima digit.
q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_08.explanation: Analyze: the size of the number does not matter; the last digit is 9.
q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_08.explanationBm: Analisis: saiz nombor tidak penting; digit akhirnya ialah 9.

q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_09.questionText: A pupil says 32 is odd and 85 is even. Which correction is best?
q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_09.questionTextBm: Murid berkata 32 ganjil dan 85 genap. Pembetulan manakah terbaik?
options: 32 is even because it ends with 2; 85 is odd because it ends with 5.
Both are even because both have two digits.
Both are odd because both are greater than 30.
32 is odd because 3 is odd; 85 is even because 8 is even.
optionsBm: 32 genap kerana berakhir dengan 2; 85 ganjil kerana berakhir dengan 5.
Kedua-duanya genap kerana mempunyai dua digit.
32 ganjil kerana 3 ganjil; 85 genap kerana 8 genap.
q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_09.explanation: Evaluate: the last digit gives the correct classification.
q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_09.explanationBm: Menilai: digit akhir memberikan pengelasan yang betul.

q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_10.questionText: Choose a four-digit even number using 1, 4, 7, and 8 once each.
q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_10.questionTextBm: Pilih nombor genap empat digit menggunakan 1, 4, 7 dan 8 sekali sahaja.
q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_10.explanation: Create: an even number must end with 4 or 8; 1 748 uses each digit once.
q_y4_whole_odd_even_numbers_10.explanationBm: Mencipta: nombor genap mesti berakhir dengan 4 atau 8; 1 748 menggunakan setiap digit sekali.

q_y4_whole_number_patterns_01.explanation: Remember: the pattern increases by 6 each time.

q_y4_whole_number_patterns_02.explanation: Remember: each number is 7 less than the previous number.
q_y4_whole_number_patterns_02.explanationBm: Ingat: setiap nombor kurang 7 daripada nombor sebelumnya.

q_y4_whole_number_patterns_03.explanation: Understand: the ten-thousands digit increases by 1, so the value adds 10 000.
q_y4_whole_number_patterns_03.explanationBm: Fahami: digit puluh ribu bertambah 1, jadi nilainya bertambah 10 000.

q_y4_whole_number_patterns_04.explanation: Understand: descending means the numbers become smaller.
q_y4_whole_number_patterns_04.explanationBm: Fahami: menurun bermaksud nombor semakin kecil.

q_y4_whole_number_patterns_07.explanation: Analyze: the pattern should add 10, so 5 150 should appear instead of 5 155.
q_y4_whole_number_patterns_07.explanationBm: Analisis: pola sepatutnya tambah 10, jadi 5 150 patut muncul, bukan 5 155.

q_y4_whole_number_patterns_08.explanation: Analyze: only the hundreds digit changes by 1 each step.
q_y4_whole_number_patterns_08.explanationBm: Analisis: hanya digit ratus berubah sebanyak 1 setiap langkah.

q_y4_whole_number_patterns_09.questionText: A student says the next number after 28 022 is 28 026 because the pattern adds 4. Which judgement is best?
q_y4_whole_number_patterns_09.questionTextBm: Murid berkata nombor selepas 28 022 ialah 28 026 kerana pola tambah 4. Pertimbangan manakah terbaik?
options: Wrong; the earlier jumps are +6, so the next number is 28 028.
optionsBm: Salah; beza sebelumnya ialah +6, jadi nombor seterusnya 28 028.
q_y4_whole_number_patterns_09.explanation: Evaluate: check more than one step before deciding the rule.
q_y4_whole_number_patterns_09.explanationBm: Menilai: semak lebih daripada satu langkah sebelum menentukan peraturan.

q_y4_whole_number_patterns_10.questionText: Choose a number that can continue this pattern: 40 298, 50 298, 60 298, __.
q_y4_whole_number_patterns_10.questionTextBm: Pilih nombor yang boleh menyambung pola ini: 40 298, 50 298, 60 298, __.

post_dec_help_001.questionText: How do I know whether 0.4 is bigger than 0.35?

steps: Find a number that divides both 2 and 6.
reply_frac_help_001.explanation: Fractions stay equal when the numerator and denominator are divided by the same number.

reply_dec_help_001.explanation: Forty hundredths is greater than thirty-five hundredths.
